title: Full Glowing Effect
description:
Full Glowing - Will change the glowing effect and will fill the entire entity

Filling the glow effect
body:
# [ RU ]
## Теперь существует 3 типа ресурс пака. 
### Внимательно посмотрите, какую версию ресурс пака вы выбрали.
### [ По умолчанию скачивается ● Full Glowing Not Outline ]

⁤
### ● Full Glowing Slim Outline
<details>
<summary>Тонкая обводка</summary>

![slim icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16713fd9e19783645877fa3ec13cfc867fcf1179.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b8b4964626dceb13e045ef9102f63db61b4821f.png)
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f461e8fa74cc0bba99d123f3839d6431f92e3de.png)


</details>
⁤

### ● Full Glowing Vanilla Outline

<details>
<summary>Ванильная обводка</summary>

  ![vanilla icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aec612970712ab05420f53162913c4bf6172c17.png)
  ![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9681d0eb9cb70951dcfe2df9e0aa4316850ffe5.png)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a43a1a27f6b5321b6b921161f3d60e19e8d0086.png)


</details>

⁤

### ● Full Glowing Not Outline


<details>
<summary>Не контурный</summary>

![not icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b4d388ca7dde3088e19ca76f7886aca2813ac0e.png)
![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e2ec6378ccb2218b6cda3bf33f8c718ee0b2b82.png)
![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b08264dc0dfc1a9b3636932d6354df9346fc29a.png)


</details>

# [ EN ]
## There are now 3 types of resource packs 
### Carefully see which version of the resource pack you have selected
### [ Default download ● Full Glowing Not Outline ]
⁤
⁤
⁤
### ● Full Glowing Slim Outline
<details>
<summary>Slim Outline</summary>

![slim icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16713fd9e19783645877fa3ec13cfc867fcf1179.png)

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f461e8fa74cc0bba99d123f3839d6431f92e3de.png)


</details>

⁤⁤⁤
